heading: Today
text: Clouds retreating south to expose sunny skies. Cooler. Highs from the mid 50s to near 60 north, low to mid 60s south. Northwest wind at 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Clear skies. Good chances of frost, mainly in central and northern VT. Lows in the 30s, some of the coldest spots could drop below 30 degrees. Light and variable wind.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly sunny in the morning, with a few passing clouds in the afternoon. Highs through the 60s, a few 70s in the warmer valleys. Calm wind.
